title: Enhance Help Window with Action Icons and Contextual Help Tabs
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the help window to include quick-action icons for scheduling a help session, emailing support, and starting a live chat, along with contextual help tutorials for my current page, so that I can get relevant assistance without leaving the application.
description:
The help window was enhanced with a richer toolbar and contextual content capabilities.

### Action Icons
Three action icons were added to the help window header bar, next to the close icon:
- **Schedule a Help Session** — links to the contact/booking page in a new window
- **Email Us** — opens a mailto link for support@datatoolspro.com
- **Chat with Us** — triggers the Zoho SalesIQ live chat widget

Each icon opens its action in a new window and has a descriptive tooltip.

### Contextual Help Tabs
The help window was restructured into two tabs:
- **This Page** — loads tutorials tagged for the current page by fetching from the WordPress JSON API using per-page tag IDs (e.g., Dictionary = 224, Migration = 182, ERD = 226, Metrics = 221, Dashboards = 227, Reports = 228, API = 231, Administration = 230). Each page has a predefined tag variable that maps to `https://datatoolspro.com/wp-json/wp/v2/tutorial?tags={id}`.
- **All Tutorials** — shows the same full tutorial list that was previously displayed.

### Zoho Chat Integration
The Zoho SalesIQ chat widget script was embedded on all pages. The chat button is hidden by default and is triggered only when the user clicks the chat icon in the help toolbar. Initial integration required troubleshooting restricted-site embed errors and ensuring the bot was available 24/7 (was initially limited to office hours).
acceptance_criteria: Help window displays three action icons (schedule, email, chat) in the header bar
Schedule icon opens the booking page in a new browser window
Email icon opens a mailto link for support@datatoolspro.com
Chat icon triggers the Zoho SalesIQ live chat window
Zoho chat button is hidden by default and only appears when triggered from the help icon
Help window has two tabs: 'This Page' and 'All Tutorials'
'This Page' tab loads contextual tutorials from the WordPress API based on the current page tag
'All Tutorials' tab displays the full list of tutorials
Tutorial links open in a new browser window
All action icons have descriptive tooltips
ux_changes: Added three action icons (schedule, email, chat) to the help window toolbar with tooltips. Restructured the help popup into two tabs: 'This Page' for contextual tutorials and 'All Tutorials' for the complete list. Integrated the Zoho SalesIQ chat widget, hidden by default and triggered via the chat icon.
middleware_changes: Each page now defines a tag variable that maps to a WordPress tutorial tag ID. The help window fetches contextual tutorials from the WordPress JSON API endpoint based on this tag. Zoho SalesIQ script is embedded on all pages with visibility controlled programmatically.
api_changes: Consumes the WordPress REST API endpoint `GET /wp-json/wp/v2/tutorial?tags={id}` to fetch page-specific tutorials. Tag IDs: Dictionary (224), Migration (182), ERD (226), Metrics (221), Dashboards (227), Reports (228), API (231), Administration (230).
implementation_notes: Zoho SalesIQ integration required whitelisting the dev server domain to resolve 'Embed not allowed for restricted sites' errors. The chat bot was initially only visible during office hours; this was changed to 24/7 availability in the Zoho admin. The chat icon click handler needed to initialize the Zoho widget before opening the chat window — clicking without prior initialization was a no-op until a fix was deployed.
comment_summary: Extensive back-and-forth on Zoho chat integration. Initial embed failed due to restricted-site policy; resolved by whitelisting the domain. Chat bot visibility was limited to office hours; changed to 24/7. Developer confirmed chat icon now correctly initializes and opens the Zoho widget. Contextual help via WordPress JSON API was refined with corrected endpoint URLs. Feature deployed to staging and then production.
